title: Ensure RAM password policy requires at least one uppercase letter

input_row.title: Ensure RAM password policy requires at least one uppercase letter
input_row.description: RAM password policies can be used to ensure password complexity. It is recommended that the password policy require at least one uppercase letter.
input_row.rationale: Enhancing complexity of a password policy increases account resiliency against brute force logon attempts.
input_row.audit: Perform the following to ensure the password policy is configured as expected: Through the management console: 1. Logon to RAM console. 2. Choose Identities > Settings. 3. In the Password Strength Settings section, make sure that the value of Required Elements in Password contains Upper-Case Letter. Through the CLI: aliyun ram GetPasswordPolicy In the output, make sure that the RequireUppercaseCharacters parameter is set to true.
input_row.remediation: Perform the following to set the password policy as expected: Through the management console: 1. Logon to RAM console. 2. Choose Identities > Settings. 3. In the Password Strength Settings section, click Edit Password Rule. 4. In the Required Elements in Password section, select UpperCase Letter. 5. Click OK. 28 | P a g e Through the CLI: aliyun ram SetPasswordPolicy --RequireUppercaseCharacters true
input_row.default_value: The default password policy does not enforce any element in a password.

step1_initial_assessment:
**AUDIT APPROACH:** Automated

**PROGRAM NAME:** ali_ram_password_policy_uppercase_character_required

**AUTOMATION DETAILS:**
- The automated program will utilize the Alibaba Cloud API call `GetPasswordPolicy` from the RAM service or the corresponding Aliyun CLI command to check the password policy settings.
- The Aliyun CLI command to be used is: `aliyun ram GetPasswordPolicy`.
- The program will validate the response by inspecting the `RequireUppercaseCharacters` parameter.
- The expectation is that `RequireUppercaseCharacters` should be set to `true` in order to comply with the control requirement.
- Clear Pass/Fail criteria:
  - **Pass:** If `RequireUppercaseCharacters` is `true`, the control is compliant.
  - **Fail:** If `RequireUppercaseCharacters` is `false` or if the parameter is missing, the control is non-compliant.

This automated approach efficiently checks the conformity of the RAM password policy with the specified control regarding uppercase character requirements, leveraging Alibaba Cloud's provided APIs directly.
